diagrams.title: Markov Chain State Transition Diagram
diagrams.description: A visual representation of a 3-state Markov chain showing transitions between states with probabilities
elements: State 1 with transitions to State 0 (0.4), State 2 (0.4), self 0.2
Arrows showing direction and probability of transitions
Labels on arrows showing transition probabilities
diagrams.purpose: Understanding state transitions, identifying absorbing states, visualizing the Markov property (future depends only on current state shown by arrows from each state)

diagrams.title: Convergence to Steady-State
diagrams.description: Graph showing how probability distribution converges to steady-state over iterations
elements: Multiple lines showing π_i(n) for different states
Convergence trajectory from initial distribution to π
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how initial distribution π^(0) evolves through π^(n) = π^(0)P^n to approach steady-state π, illustrating limiting distribution property
